svg.title: KBC Digital Media — Master booking process flow
svg.desc: Seven-stage booking workflow for KBC Digital Media, from enquiry through delivery and reporting, with five product cluster tracks in the scheduling stage.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should a client enquiry form for KBC Digital contain?')
sendPrompt('What goes into a KBC Digital media proposal and IO?')
g.text: Rate card quote, signed IO, 50% deposit or LPO

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What creative materials does KBC Digital require from clients at the material submission stage?')
g.text: Asset upload, specs check, legal/compliance sign-off

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How are the different KBC Digital product clusters scheduled?')
sendPrompt('How is social media sponsored content scheduled and managed at KBC?')
sendPrompt('How is display and rich media advertising set up on KBC digital platforms?')
sendPrompt('How are KBC livestreams set up and managed for client campaigns?')
sendPrompt('How does KBC manage app and push notification advertising setup?')
sendPrompt('How does KBC handle production deliverables like infographics, landing pages and email newsletters?')
sendPrompt('What does the go-live and monitoring stage look like for KBC Digital campaigns?')
g.text: Publish, confirm, track in real time

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does post-campaign verification and proof of delivery look like for KBC Digital?')
sendPrompt('How should KBC Digital billing and invoicing work?')
sendPrompt('What should a post-campaign report for KBC Digital contain?')
